summary: GitHub repo connected via CLI (vercel git connect). Deploy hook created. GitHub Actions workflow set up. Production URLs verified working. Native Vercel GitHub app integration still requires Dashboard authorization for full auto-deploy on push. See docs/deployment_pipeline.md for setup guide.
missing_steps: Authorize Vercel GitHub app in Vercel Dashboard for native auto-deploy on push
Go to Vercel Dashboard → python-full-course → Settings → Git → Connect Git Repository
Set Vercel project GitHub App installation for solomonczyk/Python_full_course
Once authorized, push to master will trigger automatic production deploy
